description: Generate standalone images using OpenRouter API with Google Gemini models. Use for any general-purpose image generation or editing request — e.g., "generate an image of...", "create image", "draw a...", "nano banana", "make an infographic", "生成图片", "画图", "画一个...", "信息卡片", "科普卡片". Supports text-to-image, image editing, and style presets (infographic cards). This is the go-to skill for standalone image creation. Do NOT use when the user wants to add images to an existing blog article (use yux-blog-image instead).

results.query: I have this photo at ~/Desktop/headshot.png, can you edit it to add a professional background?
nano banana draw me a sunset over mountains with dramatic lighting
I need to generate an infographic about climate change with hand-drawn style, something warm and approachable
generate a quick image of a loading spinner concept, use flash model for speed
can you create an image? I want a cute cartoon robot holding a coffee cup, maybe in a flat design style
帮我画一张猫咪的插画，水彩风格的
画一个手绘风格的信息卡片，介绍5种常见的设计模式
生成一张科普卡片，主题是量子计算的基本原理
我写了一篇关于 React hooks 的博客文章，帮我分析一下哪些地方需要插入配图
analyze my article at ./posts/2024-ai-trends.md and suggest where to put images
upload the generated images to alibaba cloud oss and update the article with cdn urls
帮我把这个视频的字幕下载下来 https://youtube.com/watch?v=abc123
帮我把这几张本地图片上传到 OSS
fix the CSS layout issue in my React component, the grid isn't aligning properly
generate article images for my blog post about kubernetes, use the existing plan
show me the status of my current Linear tasks
I need to write a blog post about the latest AI developments, can you help me draft it?
help me review and optimize the database queries in src/api/users.ts
create a new Linear issue for the homepage redesign feature
